programmes.show_description: No Calm After The Storm. A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A row with Bulent leads Makani to risk going it alone. The team goes on a make or break hunt. S5, Ep4
Boiling Point. Makani pushes through the valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. And the heat forces a survivalist to leave. S5, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Roanoke Bell Tower And Sign. Recruited by a local church, the team remove a weakening bell tower. Later, Mike works with a customer to design a stunning checkout counter. S11, Ep12
Dublin Mill. The team remove a dated water turbine from the historic Belle-Hampton Farm. Later, Mike and Tay return to the shop to build a kitchen island cart. S11, Ep13
Backseat Diver. The season's nearly over and Zeke's experiment endangers his brother. The High Noon's water heater suffers a lethal malfunction and tempers boil at the Wild Ranger. S5, Ep21
Lady Luck. With nine days left, there's risk and reward at Nome. A double sluice and lack of divers sees Emily confront her deepest fear. Shawn Pomrenke finds the ultimate land sale. S5, Ep22
The Mahoneys look for gold in one of the world's most remote regions. Meanwhile, the Victorian Diggers may have stumbled across millions of dollars' worth of gold. S4, Ep8
Formosan Clouded Leopard. Forrest tracks clues and eyewitness accounts that suggest the Formosan Clouded Leopard, which was declared extinct only recently, could still be alive. S1, Ep1
Breaking Point. A storm is brewing as a serious injury forces a crewmember to his bunk after the crane breaks on the Kodiak, and the Seabrooke's greenhorn has a mental breakdown. S7, Ep4
A Wing And A Prayer. The crew nearby come to blows on the Northwestern, and a deckhand on the Wizard falls asleep at the wheel sending the boat hurtling toward nearby vessels. S7, Ep5
Waking the Curse. In the treacherous wilds of British Columbia, six prospectors pursue a cursed cache of gold worth billions. Will they find the fortune, or fall victim to the curse? S1, Ep1
Lost Spanish Fortune, Found! Josh Gates goes to the coast of Florida and Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. S2, Ep18
Plummer's Gold. Josh sets off to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century. S3, Ep1
Cobbers Nightmare. The Raneys continue their work on the tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. They provide fresh water, strengthen walls and jumpstart an indoor garden. S3, Ep5
Troubled Water. The Raneys help a couple with a toxic salt water well, making it impossible to maintain a food source. Matt builds a solar still to de-contaminate the water. S3, Ep6
Baptism By Fire. The Cheals take on their most dangerous dig ever. The Bushmen trial a rookie to operate their exploration drill, but it doesn't go as smoothly as they'd hoped. S6, Ep2
In Search Of Fuel. The Opal Whisperers work underground together for the first time on a legendary claim. The Mooka Boys are forced to work Leif's late father's abandoned mine. S6, Ep3
Seismic Shift. The fall season begins with uncertainty. A seismic shift in sea temperature sends the fleet searching for displaced crab - and fighting an unusually large first storm. S13, Ep2
Down In Flames. Toxic smoke engulfs the Saga, Sean struggles to save the family business on the Brenna A and Wild Bill fears he may lose Nick to a terminal illness. S13, Ep3
Aliens Of The Deep. Video captured by the U.S. Navy triggers Jess and Phil's investigation into mysterious, supersonic craft flying above the waters off California's Catalina Island. S2, Ep11
Origins Of Stonehenge. Archaeology expert and adventurer, Josh Gates, travels to Great Britain to explore the origins of the mystical monument of Stonehenge. S4, Ep2
The Poseidon Crew take a gamble on gold ground they've already detected. Levi and Bridget make a rookie mistake, while the Gold Timers catch a thief. S7, Ep9
Feastmode. An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival, and out hunting, Ryan is surrounded by deadly predators. S5, Ep6
A Matter Of Life Or Seth. Scorching heat punishes Suzanne as she goes it alone. A potential snake attack could be Seth's first African food win and Bulent takes on a lizard. S5, Ep7

Teleshopping.
Drayton Mill. The Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, South Carolina. Key items include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk out of a salvaged airplane wing. S5, Ep1
Former First National Bank. The team take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, North Carolina. Items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. S5, Ep2
Hello Heartache. With three days left in the season, miners are pushed to the brink, risking sleep, safety, and sanity to dredge maximum gold. Will Shawn's master plan succeed? S5, Ep23
Goodbye Nome. The weather is warming fast as the ice season closes and the miners rush to secure their futures. On the Clark, Zeke's hunt for a paystreak has him at breaking point. S5, Ep24
The Victoria Diggers might have found a multi-million-dollar load, but they need help extracting it. The Scrappers continue to struggle with broken machines. S4, Ep9
White Wolf Of Newfoundland. Forrest teams up with an expert in Newfoundland seeking the white wolf, which was declared extinct in 1930. They meet a hunter convinced he shot one. S1, Ep2
Exit Wounds. In the midst of a rough King Crab season, a mutiny transpires on the Cornelia Marie while mental and physical breakdowns plague the crew of the Kodiak. S7, Ep6
Thick As Thieves. The police are called in after a confrontation on the Cornelia Marie while a debilitating injury to a Kodiak deckhand ends his career for good. S7, Ep7
Aliens on Terrarosa. Adam and Evan tackle the rugged terrain of the Terrarosa Glacier where a local and well-known prospector was threatened by a mysterious force. S1, Ep2
The Lost Tomb Of Attila The Hun. Josh travels to Hungary to look for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends lead the search to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest. S3, Ep2
The Vanished Empire. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how the mighty Minoan civilization disappeared from the ancient world. S3, Ep3
Hog Heaven And Homestead Hell. The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs. S3, Ep7
Treehouse Of Terror. The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty overhauls the entire base of the cabin, while Misty constructs a greenhouse. S3, Ep8
A Well That Takes On Water. The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves. S6, Ep4
Bad Luck. The Opal Whispers are forced to leave behind a rich opal seam in a mine on the verge of collapse. The Cheals are cut off from their mine by crippling floods. S6, Ep5
Crushing Blows. Wild Bill gets the truth about Nick's terminal illness. A damaging mechanical issue threatens to crush Jake's future and warming seas force Keith into the unknown. S13, Ep4
Bad Moon. Johnathan and Andy fish together for the last time. Keith's inattentive crew sends the Wizard on a collision course and an angry deckhand tests Jake's resolve. S13, Ep5
The crew race to help a man crushed by a lawnmower and a rider thrown from a horse. Plus, a driver needs an urgent airlift after a road accident. S2, Ep7
The crew is baffled by a man's mystery collapse and fear the worst at a motorbike crash. At a rugby match, a player has a suspected head injury. S2, Ep8
The Ferals confront a gold thief who's raided their lease. The Gold Retrievers explore a promising new lease, while Jacqui and Andrew get their big break. S7, Ep10
